'''Thurra''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Thurra system/Legends|Thurra system]],<ref name="GatORW" /> a part of the [[Esstran sector/Legends|Esstran sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA" />

It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Thule/Legends|Thule]] and its [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Sivvi]], and by the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Enenpa]] and its forty moons.<ref name="GatORW" />

{{Star-stub}}
